hero.title: About Atlas Rouge Immobilier
hero.subtitle: Your trusted partner for real estate in Marrakech since 2015.

story.title: Our story
story.p1: Atlas Rouge Immobilier was born from a meeting between a passion for Morocco and European real estate expertise. Since 2015, we have been supporting international families in their acquisition projects in Marrakech.
story.p2: Our bilingual team knows the local market inside out and understands European market codes. We are the bridge between two cultures.
story.p3: Our mission: make your real estate project a serene, transparent and successful experience.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We present properties with their strengths and weaknesses. No surprises.

expertise.title: Local expertise
expertise.description: Over 10 years in Marrakech. We know every neighbourhood, every street.

support.title: Support
support.description: From the first meeting to signing, we are by your side.

network.title: Network
network.description: Notaries, lawyers, architects, craftsmen. Our address book at your service.

sophie.name: Sophie Martin
sophie.bio: Passionate about real estate and Morocco, Sophie founded Atlas Rouge to support international clients in their Marrakech project.

karim.name: Karim Benali
karim.bio: An expert on the Moroccan market, Karim is your dedicated contact for all villa and riad searches.

amina.name: Amina Zerhouni
amina.bio: A specialist in Moroccan property law, Amina secures all your transactions from A to Z.

thomas.name: Thomas Dubois
thomas.bio: Thomas guides you through rental investment opportunities and wealth management.

cta.title: Ready to make your project happen?
cta.subtitle: Contact us to discuss your project, with no commitment.
